title: os.hardening.filesystem Facet
description: Filesystem-hardening posture relevant to CIS §1 (disabled unused filesystems, /tmp mount options). Projected by the os-hardening collector gather Run (charter §1.2); demanded by the shipping cis-1.x facet-observation Baselines (§1.1). Booleans are the observed compliant state (true = the control's expectation is met on the host as read).
